sqlMap.sql: SELECT f.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID , f.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME , f.FILE_PATH AS FILE_PATH , f.FILE_SIZE AS FILE_SIZE , f.TYPE_ID AS TYPE_ID , f.DOWN_COUNT AS DOWN_COUNT , f.FILE_EXT AS FILE_EXT , f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID , f.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS , f.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID , if ( #primary# = '1' , f.CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2) as CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2 as CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(f.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, f.UPDATE_ID as UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(f.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, f.TENANT_ID as TENANT_ID, type.TYPE_ICON as TYPE_ICON , folder.FOLDER_PATH as FOLDER_PATH, folder.FOLDER_NAME1 as FOLDER_NAME1, if(s.user_id = null,'1','0') as FAVORITE_STATUS, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT SHARE_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE FOLDERFILE_ID = f.FILE_ID AND FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'F' AND TENANT_ID = f.TENANT_ID) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FILESHARE_STATUS, if (f.FILE_EXT = 'folder',0,1) as FOLDER_SORT, type.TYPE_NAME AS TYPE_NAME

union all select DISTINCT folder.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID , folder.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME , folder.FOLDER_PATH AS FILE_PATH , '0' AS FILE_SIZE , 'folder' AS TYPE_ID , 0 AS DOWN_COUNT , 'folder' AS FILE_EXT , folder.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID , folder.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS , folder.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID , if ( #primary# = '1' , folder.CREATE_NAME1, folder.CREATE_NAME2) as CREATE_NAME1, folder.CREATE_NAME2 as CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(folder.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, folder.UPDATE_ID , DATE_ADD(folder.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, folder.TENANT_ID as TENANT_ID , type.TYPE_ICON AS TYPE_ICON , folder.FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH , folder.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1 , if(s.user_id =null, '1','0') as FAVORITE_STATUS, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT SHARE_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE FOLDERFILE_ID = folder.FOLDER_ID AND FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'D' AND TENANT_ID = folder.TENANT_ID) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FILESHARE_STATUS, if (FILE_EXT ='folder',0,1) as FOLDER_SORT, type.TYPE_NAME AS TYPE_NAME

sql.isNotEqual: (t.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchCreateName#, '%') or t.CREATE_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchCreateName#, '%'))

sqlMap.sql:
select folder_id, tenant_id from tbl_webfolder_folderuser where tenant_id = #tenantId# and USER_ID in
#idList[].id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(OWNER_ID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE OWNER_ID = #ownerId# AND FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# AND FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT IF (FOLDER_ID IS NULL, 1, MAX(CONVERT(FOLDER_ID, UNSIGNED)) + 1) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER ( FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) SELECT #id#, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, #folderType#, CONCAT('|', #id#, '|'), 0, 0, 'root', 'Y', #ownerId#, #userId#, #timeUTC#, #createName1#, #createName2#, #userId#, #timeUTC#, #compId#, #tenantId#
FROM TBL_USERMASTER
FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER
WHERE CN = #ownerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT FOLDER_ID as id, CASE WHEN FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' THEN '##' ELSE FOLDER_UPPER END PARENT, CASE WHEN FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END SELECTED, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN FOLDER_NAME1 ELSE FOLDER_NAME2 END TEXT, CREATE_ID AS CREATEID, FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDERNAME1, FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDERNAME2, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDERLEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND FOLDER_TYPE = 'U' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND OWNER_ID = #userId# ORDER BY SELECTED DESC, FOLDER_LEVEL

SELECT FOLDER_ID AS ID, CASE WHEN FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' THEN '##' ELSE FOLDER_UPPER END PARENT, CASE WHEN FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END SELECTED, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN FOLDER_NAME1 ELSE FOLDER_NAME2 END TEXT, CREATE_ID AS CREATEID, FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDERNAME1, FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDERNAME2, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDERLEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND FOLDER_TYPE = 'D' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND OWNER_ID IN
#idList[]#
ORDER BY SELECTED DESC , FOLDER_LEVEL

SELECT DISTINCT F.FOLDER_ID AS ID, CASE WHEN F.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' THEN '##' ELSE FOLDER_UPPER END PARENT, CASE WHEN F.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END SELECTED, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN F.FOLDER_NAME1 ELSE F.FOLDER_NAME2 END TEXT, F.CREATE_ID AS CREATEID, F.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDERNAME1, F.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDERNAME2 , F.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDERLEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F JOIN ( SELECT FF.FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU ON FF.FOLDER_ID = FU.FOLDER_ID AND FF.TENANT_ID = FU.TENANT_ID AND FF.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FU.USER_ID IN
#idList[]#
WHERE FF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) FP ON F.FOLDER_PATH LIKE concat(FP.FOLDER_PATH , '%') WHERE F.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND F.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# UNION SELECT FOLDER_ID AS ID, '##' AS PARENT, 1 AS SELECTED, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN FOLDER_NAME1 ELSE FOLDER_NAME2 END TEXT, CREATE_ID AS CREATEID, FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDERNAME1, FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDERNAME2, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDERLEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE OWNER_ID = #compId# AND FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY SELECTED DESC , FOLDERLEVEL

select distinct ff.FOLDER_ID as id ,if( ff.folder_upper = 'root', '##', ff.FOLDER_UPPER )as parent, if ( ff.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root', true, false) as selected, if ( #primary# = '1' , ff.FOLDER_NAME1, ff.FOLDER_NAME2) as text, ff.create_id as createId from tbl_webfolder_folder as ff inner join (
select SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(fld.FOLDER_PATH, '|', 2),'|',-1) as a, fld.folder_id, fld.folder_path from tbl_webfolder_folder fld inner join
( select * from tbl_webfolder_folderuser where USER_ID in ( select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# union all select owner_id from tbl_webfolder_folderuser user inner join tbl_webfolder_folder folder on user.folder_id = folder.folder_id where user_id = #userId# AND USER_TYPE = 'chief' and folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# group by seq_id ) or user_id = #userId# or user_id= #deptId# or user_id in( SELECT d2.cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER d2 JOIN ( SELECT f.* FROM ( tbl_webfolder_folder f JOIN tbl_webfolder_folderuser u ON f.FOLDER_ID = u.FOLDER_ID AND u.USER_ID = #userId# AND u.USER_TYPE = 'chief' AND f.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID ) ) AS a ON d2.CN = a.OWNER_ID AND d2.TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID WHERE d2.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) ) as user on fld.folder_id = user.folder_id where fld.folder_type = #folderType# and user.tenant_id = #tenantId# )as tt on tt.folder_id = ff.folder_id or tt.folder_id = ff.folder_id or ff.FOLDER_PATH like concat('%',tt.folder_path,'%') where ff.tenant_id = #tenantId# and ff.owner_id = #comId# and ff.use_status = 'Y' union all select ff.FOLDER_ID as id ,if( ff.folder_upper = 'root', '##', ff.FOLDER_UPPER )as parent, if ( ff.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root', true, false) as selected, if ( #primary# = '1' , ff.FOLDER_NAME1, ff.FOLDER_NAME2) as text, ff.create_id as createId from tbl_webfolder_folder ff where ff.tenant_id = #tenantId# and ff.owner_id = #comId# and ff.use_status = 'Y' and ff.COMPANY_ID = #comId# and ff.folder_type = #folderType# and ff.folder_upper = 'root' order by selected desc
SELECT FOLDER_UPPER FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

select * from (
from tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_id = #folderId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# ) folder on folder.folder_id = f.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = #tenantId# left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
from tbl_webfolder_filetype type LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_webfolder_folder folder ON type.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on folder.folder_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='D' where folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.folder_upper = #folderId# and folder.company_id = #comId# ) t where 1=1
(DATE_FORMAT(t.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') >= #searchStartDate# AND DATE_FORMAT(t.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') <= #searchEndDate#)
t.TYPE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileType#, '%')
ORDER BY FOLDER_SORT, CREATE_DATE DESC LIMIT #pStart#, #pEnd#

FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f ON folder.FOLDER_ID = f.FOLDER_ID AND folder.TENANT_ID = f.TENANT_ID JOIN ( SELECT FF.FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU ON FF.FOLDER_ID = FU.FOLDER_ID AND FF.TENANT_ID = FU.TENANT_ID AND FF.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND FU.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
WHERE FF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) FP ON folder.FOLDER_PATH LIKE concat(FP.FOLDER_PATH , '%') JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID AND type.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' WHERE f.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
FROM tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like concat(#folderPath# , '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# and USE_STATUS = 'Y') folder on f.folder_id = folder.folder_id and folder.tenant_id = f.tenant_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
(DATE_FORMAT(t.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') >= #searchStartDate# AND DATE_FORMAT(t.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') <= #searchEndDate#)
t.TYPE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileType#, '%')
ORDER BY FOLDER_SORT, CREATE_DATE DESC LIMIT #pStart#, #pEnd#

SELECT DISTINCT t.* from (
from tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like concat(#folderPath#, '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# ) folder on folder.folder_id = f.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
from tbl_webfolder_filetype type inner JOIN tbl_webfolder_folder folder ON type.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' and folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on folder.folder_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='D' where folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and type.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.company_id = #comId# and folder_path <> #folderPath#
) t
where folder_path like concat(#folderPath#, '%')
ORDER BY FOLDER_SORT, CREATE_DATE DESC LIMIT #pStart#, #pEnd#

SELECT DISTINCT t.* from (
FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f ON folder.FOLDER_ID = f.FOLDER_ID AND folder.TENANT_ID = f.TENANT_ID JOIN ( SELECT FF.FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU ON FF.FOLDER_ID = FU.FOLDER_ID AND FF.TENANT_ID = FU.TENANT_ID AND FF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND FF.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FU.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
WHERE FF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) FP ON folder.FOLDER_PATH LIKE concat(FP.FOLDER_PATH , '%') JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID AND type.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' WHERE f.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
FROM tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like concat(#folderPath# , '%') and folder_path <> #folderPath# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# and use_status = 'Y' ) folder on f.folder_id = folder.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
) t
where folder_path like concat(#folderPath# ,'%')
ORDER BY FOLDER_SORT,CREATE_DATE desc LIMIT #pStart#, #pEnd#

select.isNotEqual:
SELECT count(folder.folder_id) as cnt from tbl_webfolder_filetype type inner JOIN tbl_webfolder_folder folder ON type.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' where folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.company_id = #comId# and type.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_path <> #folderPath#
folder.folder_path like concat('%', #folderPath#, '%')
folder.folder_upper = #folderId#
type.FILE_EXT LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchExt#, '%')
(folder.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchCreateName#, '%') or folder.CREATE_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchCreateName#, '%'))
type.TYPE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileType#, '%')
(folder.folder_name1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileName#, '%') or folder.folder_name2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileName#, '%'))
(DATE_FORMAT(t.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') >= #searchStartDate# AND DATE_FORMAT(t.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') <= #searchEndDate#)
select.isEqual: select count(*) as cnt from dual where 1=0

sqlMap.select:
SELECT distinct count(*) from ( SELECT DISTINCT folder.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1, f.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, f.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME, f.FILE_EXT AS FILE_EXT, f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, f.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, if ( #primary# = '1' , f.CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2) AS CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(f.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, f.TENANT_ID , type.TYPE_NAME AS TYPE_NAME
FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f ON folder.FOLDER_ID = f.FOLDER_ID AND folder.TENANT_ID = f.TENANT_ID JOIN ( SELECT FF.FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU ON FF.FOLDER_ID = FU.FOLDER_ID AND FF.TENANT_ID = FU.TENANT_ID AND FF.USE_STATUS='Y' AND FF.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FU.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
WHERE FF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) FP ON folder.FOLDER_PATH LIKE concat(FP.FOLDER_PATH , '%') JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID AND type.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# WHERE f.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
FROM tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like concat(#folderPath# ,'%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# ) folder on f.folder_id = folder.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
) t where 1=1

select count(*) from ( SELECT f.file_id from tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_id = #folderId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and use_status='Y' ) t on t.folder_id = f.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
t.TYPE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileType#, '%')
(DATE_FORMAT(t.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') >= #searchStartDate# AND DATE_FORMAT(t.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') <= #searchEndDate#)
) totalCount

select count(*) from ( SELECT file_id
FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f ON folder.FOLDER_ID = f.FOLDER_ID AND folder.TENANT_ID = f.TENANT_ID JOIN ( SELECT FF.FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU ON FF.FOLDER_ID = FU.FOLDER_ID AND FF.TENANT_ID = FU.TENANT_ID AND FF.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FU.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
WHERE FF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and use_status='Y' ) FP ON folder.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(FP.FOLDER_PATH , '%') JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID AND type.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# WHERE F.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND F.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
FROM tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like CONCAT(#folderPath# , '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# and use_status='Y') t on f.folder_id = t.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
t.TYPE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileType#, '%')
(DATE_FORMAT(t.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') >= #searchStartDate# AND DATE_FORMAT(t.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') <= #searchEndDate#)
)totalCount

SELECT distinct folder.folder_id as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.folder_upper ) as parent, folder.folder_name1 as text,folder.create_id as createId from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(folder.FOLDER_PATH, '|' ,3), '|', -1) in( select distinct folder.folder_id FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and user.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id = #comId# and (user.USER_ID IN (select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or dept.cn = #deptId#) or user.USER_ID = #userId# or user.USER_ID = #comId#) ) and folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# or (folder.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id =#comId# and folder.use_status = 'Y' and folder.OWNER_ID = #comId#) or (folder.use_status = 'Y' AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.COMPANY_ID = #comId# and (folder.OWNER_ID = #userId# or folder.OWNER_ID = #deptId# or folder.OWNER_ID = #comId# or folder.OWNER_ID IN ( select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or dept.cn = #deptId#) )) order by folder.FOLDER_TYPE

select distinct folder.FOLDER_ID as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.FOLDER_UPPER )as parent, folder.create_id as createId, if ( #primary# = '1' , folder.FOLDER_NAME1, folder.FOLDER_NAME2) as text, if ( folder.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root', true, false) as selected from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.FOLDER_ID = user.FOLDER_ID where folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.use_status = 'Y' AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.COMPANY_ID = #comId# and folder.OWNER_ID = #userId# order by selected desc

SELECT distinct folder.folder_id as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.folder_upper ) as parent, folder.owner_id as owner, folder.FOLDER_PATH,folder.CREATE_ID as createId, if ( #primary# = '1' , folder.FOLDER_NAME1, folder.FOLDER_NAME2) as text, if ( folder.owner_id = #deptId# && folder.folder_upper = 'root', true, false) as selected from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.company_id = #comId# and folder.owner_id in ( select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or folder.owner_id = #deptId# union select owner_id from tbl_webfolder_folderuser user inner join tbl_webfolder_folder folder on user.folder_id = folder.folder_id where user_id = #userId# AND USER_TYPE = 'chief' and folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# group by seq_id ) and folder.use_status = 'Y' union select f.folder_id as id ,if( f.folder_upper = 'root', '##', f.folder_upper ) as parent, f.owner_id as owner, f.FOLDER_PATH, f.CREATE_ID as createId, if ( #primary# = '1' , f.FOLDER_NAME1, f.FOLDER_NAME2) as text, if ( f.owner_id = #deptId# && f.folder_upper = 'root', true, false) as selected
from
( tbl_deptmaster as dept inner join tbl_webfolder_folder f on dept.cn = f.owner_id inner join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on f.folder_id = user.FOLDER_ID and f.tenant_id = user.tenant_id )
where user.user_id = #userId# and f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and user.USER_TYPE = 'chief' and f.use_status = 'Y' order by selected desc
SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and FOLDER_ID = #folderId#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #comId# and CN = #userId#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT if (folder_id is null,1, MAX(CONVERT(FOLDER_ID ,UNSIGNED))+1) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER( FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES( #id#, #folderName1#, #folderName2#, #folderType#, concat(#folderPath#,#id#,'|'), #folderStep#, #folderLevel#, #folderUppId#, 'Y', #ownerId#, #userId#, #timeUTC#, #createName1#, #createName2#, #userId#, #timeUTC#, #comId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT if(MAX(FOLDER_STEP) is not null, +1,0) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_UPPER = #folderUppId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select DEPTID as cn from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select cn from tbl_addjobmaster where DEPTID = #deptId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select cn , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 from tbl_deptmaster where DEPT_CD_PATH like concat('%',#deptId#,'%') and tenant_id =#tenantId#

SELECT count(owner_id) FROM tbl_webfolder_folder WHERE tenant_id =#tenantId# and company_id = #comId# and folder_type = #folderType# and folder_upper='root'
owner_id = #comId#
owner_id = #deptId#
owner_id = #userId#
select cn , DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2 ,EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 ,EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 ,EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 from tbl_deptmaster WHERE tenant_id =#tenantId# and cn =#deptId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER SET UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC#, FOLDER_NAME1 = #newFolderName1#, FOLDER_NAME2 = #newFolderName2# WHERE folder_id = #folderId# and COMPANY_ID = #comId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( select create_id from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like concat(#folderPath# , '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# GROUP BY create_id ) t1 ) = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( select create_id from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like concat(#folderPath# , '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# GROUP BY create_id ) t2 WHERE CREATE_ID = #userId# ) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS RESULT FROM DUAL

SELECT CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( select f.create_id from tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select folder_id from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like #folderPath# || '%' and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) t on f.folder_id = t.folder_id group by create_id ) t1 ) = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( select f.create_id from tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select folder_id from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like #folderPath# || '%' and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) t on f.folder_id = t.folder_id group by create_id ) t2 WHERE CREATE_ID = #userId# ) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS RESULT FROM DUAL
sqlMap.update: update tbl_webfolder_folder as folder set folder.use_status = 'T' , folder.DELETER_ID = #userId# where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_PATH like ( select path from ( select concat(df.folder_path ,'%') as path from tbl_webfolder_folder df where df.folder_id = #folderId# and df.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and df.company_id = #comId#) a)

update tbl_webfolder_file as file set file.use_status = 'T', file.DELETER_ID = #userId# where file.FOLDER_ID in ( select id from ( select concat(folder.folder_path ,'%') as path, folder.FOLDER_ID id from tbl_webfolder_folder folder where folder.folder_path like concat('%|',#folderId#,'|%') and folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id = #comId#) a) and file.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT if (folder_id is null,1, MAX(CONVERT(FOLDER_ID ,UNSIGNED))+1) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
INSERT INTO tbl_webfolder_folder ( FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) SELECT #id#, #folderName1#, #folderName2#, #folderType#, concat(#folderPath#,#id#,'|'), #folderStep#, #folderLevel#, #folderUppId#, 'Y', #deptId#, #userId#, #timeUTC#, #createName1#, #createName2#, #userId#, #timeUTC#, #comId#, #tenantId# FROM tbl_webfolder_folder WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT owner_id FROM tbl_webfolder_folder WHERE owner_id = #deptId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = 'D' ) LIMIT 1 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL( ( select ENV_VALUE from tbl_webfolder_env where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and ENV_TYPE='P') , 10) as cnnt
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_webfolder_env (cn, env_type,env_value,tenant_id) value (#userId#,'P',#listCount#, #tenantId#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE env_value = #listCount#
sqlMap.select: SELECT fld.* FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER fld inner join TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f ON f.folder_id = fld.folder_id WHERE f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and fld.COMPANY_ID = #comId# and f.FILE_ID = #fileId#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F ON FU.FOLDER_ID = F.FOLDER_ID AND FU.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE F.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FU.USER_ID IN
#permissionIdList[]#
AND FU.FOLDER_ID IN
#folderIdList[]#
AND FU.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
